data.title: Audit and update Python implementation-plan test files for new SKILL.md sections
data.description:
## Description

Audit Python test files that test implementation-plan SKILL.md for compatibility with the new Proposal Generation and Resolution Loop sections.

**Files to audit**:
1. tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_tdd_reviewer.py — TDD reviewer behavior tests
2. tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_skill_tdd_enforcement.py — Step 3 TDD enforcement (references "SKILL.md Step 3")
3. tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_bidirectional_tdd.py — file impact enumeration tests
4. tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_skill_eval_tasks.py — eval task section tests
5. tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_reinvocation_guard.py — re-invocation guard tests
6. tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_replan_escalate.py — REPLAN_ESCALATE signal tests

**Audit process**: For each file, check whether assertions:
- Reference step numbers that changed (new sections are subsections, step numbering should be stable)
- Use section-scoped extractions that break with new adjacent sections
- Validate content that moved due to insertion of new sections

**If compatible**: Document "no changes needed" with evidence.
**If broken**: Update assertions to match new SKILL.md structure.

**Cross-story prerequisite**: Stories 68f6-9130, a1f3-db49, 4acd-215a must be complete.

**Unit test exemption**: Test file audit/update, no new conditional logic, infrastructure-boundary.

## Files to modify
- tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_*.py (audit all 6, update as needed)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] All Python implementation-plan tests pass
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python3 -m pytest tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_*.py -v --tb=short
